nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I do love how much time it saves me and how much more it opens me creatively

nodes.grounding_span: the ability to follow directions is my biggest paint point

nodes.label: AI as professional polish tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous final output
nodes.grounding_span: it is a great starting point and makes my life easier because I don't have to think so hard to get a writing task started

nodes.label: AI for niche expertise

nodes.grounding_span: it is too niche for AI to grasp the understanding

nodes.label: Human creative touch and consistency
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to do some of the graphic design elements myself, like icon and small graphic creation so I can add my own flare and consistency among elements

nodes.label: Creative expression and quality
nodes.grounding_span: we understand the importance of the human touch

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saves me a lot of time

nodes.label: Client success and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: better able to customize web pages to my clients needs

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I do love how much time it saves me and how much more it opens me creatively

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I have been more frustrated lately, especially with ChatGPT as it seems to be getting worse

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I will always be cautious around it since I see how often it can't follow simple instructions

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to do some of the graphic design elements myself

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask it to do several rewrites on its own and then once I'm happy with it I go in and rewrite it to my standards

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: When I work with extremely specialized clients it's better for me to write content myself
